latest_synthetic_no_constraint.title: Synthetic LINT-03 fixture
latest_synthetic_no_constraint.description: Synthetic latest_* methodology entry that selects across all snapshots instead of the latest one; used to exercise the LINT-03 static check.
latest_synthetic_no_constraint.data_source: Synthetic query that intentionally omits both the __GRAPH_URI__ token and the ORDER BY DESC(?graph) LIMIT 1 + STRSTARTS(STR(?graph), ...) latest-snapshot constraint pair.
latest_synthetic_no_constraint.limitations: Not a real plot query; exists only as a frozen LINT-03 negative-case test fixture and must NOT be added to static/data/methodology_notes.json.
